mapper.select: SELECT AGGREGATE_TO FROM TB_NOTIFY_HISTORY WHERE SERVER_ID = #{serverId} AND NOTIFY_STATUS IN ('SUCCESS', 'PARTIAL') ORDER BY NOTIFY_START_AT DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NOTIFY_HISTORY ( NOTIFY_HISTORY_ID, SERVER_ID, AGGREGATE_FROM, AGGREGATE_TO, NORMAL_COUNT, WARNING_COUNT, ERROR_COUNT, RECV_TOTAL_COUNT, RECV_SUCCESS_COUNT, RECV_FAIL_COUNT, NOTIFY_MESSAGE, NOTIFY_STATUS, FAIL_REASON, NOTIFY_START_AT, NOTIFY_END_AT, NOTIFY_DATE, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{notifyHistoryId}, #{serverId}, #{aggregateFrom}, #{aggregateTo}, #{normalCount}, #{warningCount}, #{errorCount}, #{recvTotalCount}, #{recvSuccessCount}, #{recvFailCount}, #{notifyMessage}, #{notifyStatus}, #{failReason}, #{notifyStartAt}, #{notifyEndAt}, #{notifyDate}, COALESCE(#{createdAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
